title: platform-user — notification classes + categories
description: Every notification here targets ONLY the Stackra-staff plane — mail to internal `@stackra.com` addresses, in-app on the platform-admin dashboard, Slack via the internal-notifications transport, PagerDuty via the on-call transport. NEVER cross-emitted to tenant users. All three categories are `transactional_required` — platform staff cannot opt out (they are Stackra's own employees, not customer users; consent is governed by the employment contract, not the notification-preferences UI).

categories.description: New Stackra employee onboarded. Goes to the ops distribution list + the new hire's manager + the new hire themselves (welcome message). Includes department, employment type, hire date, manager, and links to the onboarding checklist + the platform-admin dashboard.

Offboarding kicked off for a Stackra employee. Goes to the ops distribution list + security + the offboarding target's manager. Includes reason, effective_at, and the ACL-inventory report link (what tenants + what tools this PlatformUser had access to — required for the 24h revocation SLA review). Never sent to the offboarded PlatformUser themselves (HR handles that off-channel).

Fires when internal escalation logic resolves an on-call PlatformUser AND primary channels (Slack) failed acknowledgment within N minutes. Sends via the PagerDuty transport (with fall-through to SMS via Twilio) to the resolved on-call phone number. Volume-critical — misfires wake people up at 3am, so the underlying OnCallResolver has strict debounce + acknowledged-window logic.
